summary: A produced black-and-white clip with burned-in captions. A woman with long hair speaks to the camera while holding up a photograph of several people; a caption reads 'to live the nightmare'. In another frame she is shown against a dark backdrop wearing a dark blazer with a 'TRUMP' pin and a small photo of a young person pinned to her clothing.

script.scene: A woman holds up a photograph of several people and speaks; caption 'to live the nightmare'.
The woman speaks against a dark backdrop wearing a 'TRUMP' pin and a small pinned photo of a young person.
